caption: A man dressed in a blue traditional outfit performs a martial arts demonstration with a long staff in a large indoor hall. He is positioned on a blue mat in front of an audience seated at tables along the sides of the room. In the initial sequence, he stands with his body angled, holding the staff high in the air. As the sequence progresses, he shifts his weight, lunging forward and rotating his body to swing the staff downward in a wide, sweeping arc. The staff has a red tip that becomes more visible as it moves. The audience, composed of people in various formal and semi-formal attire, watches the performance. The room features high ceilings with recessed lighting and tan-colored walls. The background remains constant while the man's dynamic movements with the staff drive the action.
